channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Wemby at The Garden. LeBron vs. Steph. The NBA's Christmas Day lineup, as always, has star power
item.description: LeBron James made his Christmas debut in 2003. Victor Wembanyama was born 10 days later. That's right: James has been featured on the NBA's big day for longer than Wembanyama has been alive.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Blackhawks drop 2nd straight on road trip in 4-3 loss to Wild
item.description: ST. PAUL, Minn. (AP) — Brock Faber snapped a tie in the third period, and the Minnesota Wild stopped a four-game losing streak by edging the Blackhawks, 4-3, on Monday night. Kirill Kaprizov, Jared Spurgeon and Marcus Foligno also scored for Minnesota.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Caitlin Clark honored as AP Female Athlete of the Year following her impact on women's sports
item.description: Caitlin Clark has been named the AP Female Athlete of the Year after raising the profile of women’s basketball to unprecedented levels in both college and the WNBA.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Could SF Giants upgrade at first base? Following eventful weekend, their options are growing slim
item.description: Buster Posey said the Giants will keep their options open at first base, but how many options are available following an eventful weekend?
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: Texas football mascot Bevo barred from sidelines of upcoming CFP game, organizers say
item.description: The Texas Longhorns' live mascot Bevo will not be able to travel to the Chick-fil-A Peach Bowl, organizers for the game said Monday. Texas plays Arizona State in the CFP.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bucs' Cody Mauch adjusting to and enjoying Tampa Bay's warm winters
item.description: Bucs' offensive lineman Cody Mauch is in his second year in the NFL, which means he is spending another Christmas in paradise.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 49ers eliminated from NFC playoffs before game against Miami. Cowboys, Saints, Cardinals also out
item.description: MIAMI GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — The defending NFC champion San Francisco 49ers were eliminated from the playoffs before their game at Miami began on Sunday because of victories by Washington and the Los Angeles Rams.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes land talented running back Wayshawn Parker
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes football team may have picked up its biggest off-season acquisition yet. Washington State running back Wayshawn Parker, considered one of the top backs in the transfer portal, announced he will play for the Utes next season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bay FC Treasure Island training facility lease approved by SF mayor
item.description: (BCN) --San Francisco Mayor London Breed signed legislation on Thursday that will allow the women's professional soccer team Bay Football Club, or Bay FC, to make Treasure Island their future home with a permanent training center.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Guentzel scores in 7 consecutive games, 1 shy of matching the franchise record in Tuesday's win against Blue Jackets
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — Nick Paul had a goal and two assists to lead the Tampa Bay Lightning to a 5-3 victory over the Columbus Blue Jackets. Jake Guentzel, Luke Glendening, Brayden Point and Mitchell Chaffee also scored for Tampa Bay, which has won five of six. Andrei Vasilevskiy finished with 28 saves.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Runnin' Utes roll past Florida A&M, 89-59
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's last home game of 2024 was a memorable one, as the Utes cruised past Florida A&M, 89-59. Mike Sharavjamts and Mason Madsen each scored 15 points off the bench to lead a balanced Utah attack. The Utes bench scored 57 points, while the starters scored 32.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
